title: 1981-04-16_Pat_149.txt
key_claims: The "pulley" vision represents Dick's method of lateral/heuristic thinking: moving orthogonally along a 4th axis (converting time into space) to acquire information *in advance* of normal linear deduction.
VALIS is the externalized, macrocosmic version of the heuristic feedback loop normally operating between Dick's two brain hemispheres (left vs right, time vs space).
The syzygy (union) of the two hemispheres creates the "Chemical Wedding" (Ditheon/Firebright), an immortal, bilateral entity capable of surviving death.

The overarching conclusion of the *VALIS* trilogy is that Christ and the Buddha are homologized as the Maitreya, and that this savior is ultimately YHWH (ABBA), whose core nature is *Agape* (loving-kindness).
recurring_concepts: **Atman-Brahman**: The realization that the internal micro-structure (the two hemispheres of the brain) is perfectly reflective of the external macro-structure (VALIS/The Universe).
reading_excerpt: The "pulley" vision represents Dick's method of lateral/heuristic thinking: moving orthogonally along a 4th axis (converting time into space) to acquire information *in advance* of normal linear deduction.
